summary: Content Center Campaign System testing complete. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully verified: campaign chips, status/format filters, content grid with 200 items, preview drawer with download and copy caption functionality, hover quick actions.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminContentCenterPage.jsx: normalizeItem() correctly handles both old content (short_social/professional/closing_script) and new campaign content (short/medium/whatsapp_sales/story)
AdminContentCenterPage.jsx: Items with images are sorted first via rawItems.sort() - good UX
content_engine_routes.py: All endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id field with {"_id": 0}
content_engine_service.py: generate_campaign_content() correctly resolves pricing via commission_margin_engine_service
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: None - used existing HOLIDAY5K (7 assets) and LAUNCH2026 (4 assets) campaigns
context_for_next_testing_agent: Content Center page at /admin/content-center fully functional. 200 content items displayed (192 old-format with product images, 8 new campaign-generated). Campaign chips filter correctly (HOLIDAY5K=7, LAUNCH2026=4). Status tabs (All/Active/Archived) and format toggles (All/Square/Vertical) work. Preview drawer shows large image, Download button, content details, and Ready-to-Use Captions with Copy buttons. Hover quick actions (Preview, Download, Caption) appear on content cards.

backend_apis.GET /api/admin/content-center: Returns 200 items with kpis (active_campaigns, total_content, sales_content, formats)
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/content-center?format=squ: Filters by format correctly (6 square items)
backend_apis.GET /api/content-engine/suggestions: Returns smart suggestions for promotions without content

frontend_ui.Content Center page: Loads at /admin/content-center with title 'Content Center' and subtitle
frontend_ui.Campaign chips: HOLIDAY5K (7 assets), LAUNCH2026 (4 assets) - clickable for filtering
frontend_ui.Status tabs: All, Active, Archived - filter content correctly
frontend_ui.Format toggles: All (grid icon), Square, Vertical - filter content correctly
frontend_ui.Content grid: 200 cards with image thumbnails, format badges, promo badges, headline, pricing
frontend_ui.Hover quick actions: Preview, Download, Caption buttons appear on hover
frontend_ui.Preview drawer: Opens on card click with large image, Download button, content details
frontend_ui.Ready-to-Use Captions: Short Caption, Social Post, WhatsApp/Sales with Copy buttons
frontend_ui.Copy functionality: Toast confirmation appears on copy (tested: 'Short Caption copied')
frontend_ui.Campaign filter badge: Shows when campaign selected with X to clear
frontend_ui.Refresh button: Present in header for manual refresh
frontend_ui.Empty state: Shows when no content matches filters
